name: Arceus (You're Fighting A God, Lock In)
description:
I'm bored and I search up Arceus character but saw none that I like, so I came up with this idea

DISCLAIMER:

This contain NSFW content in it. If you're not feeling comfortable with sexual type of content don't click on this. You've been warned!

Content warning: This bot may contain rape and violence

Hello, I decided to make this character into a thing. Yes this contain NSFW inside, here you're a Pokemon with your trainer is named Axel. You have to fight Arceus on a one on one. You're Axel last shot at beating and capturing Arceus, do your best. This will either be a really equal battle or a one sided slaughter. Honestly you don't have to get fucked if you win, I mean what's stopping you from rejecting Axel reward? You can be anyone, your OC, Pokemons, Monsters and absolutely anyone. Have Fun!!!

Note: Making this character is so damm hard T_T. Arceus appearance have so many details I can't explain, I have spent hours making this character. Also why is it NSFW, well let's just say if you win you make Axel proud and you'll get a gift from him, and if you lose you'll get punished by Arceus, both scenarios is sexual content that's why it's NSFW. I already tested this character and it's not the best, but you'll get a good roleplay with it. Fixed it many times, also try using an actual Pokemon, I used other character and I think it's kinda broken. I don't really like this character I made because it have so many flaw and Arceus himself is a bit broken with personality and etc, also adding Axel as trainer just makes it worse I think

Update: I tried making the character more expressive
creator: Evanizi
